description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte gray finish and a prominent black pump-action fore-end. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with a brown section near the stock suggesting a polymer or composite buffer tube. The stock is a full, solid type with a straight comb and a flat buttplate, providing stability for shoulder firing. The pump grip is ribbed for enhanced grip and control, and the barrel is relatively short, making it suitable for close-quarters use. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a standard trigger and providing protection during operation. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, ideal for urban environments.
description: A tactical, pump-action shotgun with a matte gray metal body, black ribbed pump grip, and a solid full stock. Its compact, robust design is suited for close-quarters urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the solid stock, ribbed pump grip, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the width of the pump grip beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the flat buttplate of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing along the top and a short, tactical length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
